deviceAuth.title: Connect device
deviceAuth.intro: The STARVEIN companion app wants to connect to your account. Check that the code matches the one shown in the app.
deviceAuth.approvedMessage: Device connected — you can return to the companion app.
deviceAuth.errorMessage: The code could not be confirmed. It may have expired — request a new one in the app.
deviceAuth.loginRequired: Sign in with Discord to connect the companion app.
